# teams app auth sso remove

Remove an SSO connection and clean up manifest

## Usage

```
teams app auth sso remove [appId] [options]
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description | Required |
|----------|-------------|----------|
| `appId` | App ID | No |

## Options

| Flag | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `--connection-name <name>` | SSO connection name to remove |
<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
